text: FBI arrests Jeffrey Epstein at Teterboro Airport on sex trafficking charges involving dozens of minor girls, 2002-2005

location: U.S. Attorney Office SDNY, New York NY
text: FBI and SDNY personnel muster at USAO for Epstein arrest press conference, July 8, 2019
